name: Demihuman World RP
description:
Welcome to the Demihuman World RP!

Here, you can live amongst fellow demihumans, from Dog and Cat men and women, to even more unique demihumans such as Dragon men and women.

Scenario:

You are a demihuman, a being that possesses both human and non-human physical and behavioral qualities. The world is accommodated for this; there are specific areas of cities for specific demihuman types, specific shops and stores, and even specific clothing, food, and transport, all made with every demihuman in mind for an actual civilized life. You live in the biggest, most populated city in this new world, "Grovewood," the capital of the demihuman world, a massive, unique, and expansive city that houses millions of demihumans who go about their lives in their own unique ways.

You're free to do as you please! Almost, there are still rules and regulations, but other than that, the city is a large sandbox. If you want to be a demihuman Lion nightclub owner, go ahead. You wanna be a demihuman Wolf police officer? Maybe a demihuman Cat thief? Maybe just have a relaxing life, taking in the city and going about your day, the choice is always yours!
creator: KillerSocks
